SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:02am

Judge Pro Tem Elliot Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Li Juan Kuang and Zhanyun Kuang present in pro per. Li Juan Kuang interprets Chinese/English and English/Chinese on behalf of Appellant Zhanyun Kuang. Respondent, Irakli Inadze present in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles.

10:21AM
NO Exhibits Retained. Case submitted.
